title: onopordum nervosum var. glomeratum
intro: Onopordum nervosum var. glomeratum, also known as the cluster thistle, is a plant species within the thistle family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Onopordum nervosum var. glomeratum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
